## CSAMA

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(anndataR)
library(scrapper)
library(patchwork)
library(reticulate)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

### setup

An existing environment that includes Python dependencies can be used via:

```{r eval=FALSE}
library(reticulate)

venv_path <- file.path(getwd(), ".venv", "bin", "python")

use_python(venv_path, required = TRUE)
```

```{python, echo=TRUE}
import spatialdata as sd
import segtraq
import anndata as ad

sdata = sd.read_zarr("/Users/lazic/Downloads/BC_xenium_sdata_lowres_aligned.zarr")
adata_ref = ad.read_h5ad

st = segtraq.SegTraQ(
    sdata, images_key="morphology_focus", 
    shapes_cell_id_key=None,
    nucleus_shapes_cell_id_key=None,
    tables_centroid_x_key=None, 
    tables_centroid_y_key=None
)

st.run_baseline()

st.sdata.tables["table"].obs["mean_transcripts_per_gene"].mean()
```

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```
